title: distichlis littoralis
intro: Distichlis littoralis, also known as saltgrass or alkali grass, is a perennial grass native to the coastal regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Distichlis littoralis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has been used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
